recap:
- A RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) chain has been created and registered, but building them is not covered in this course.
- The `mlflow` library is imported to facilitate model loading and management.
- The catalog name is defined as "genai_shared_catalog_03" for organizing models.
- The schema name is dynamically generated using the cluster owner's organization ID from Spark configuration.
- The model name is constructed by combining the catalog and schema names with a specific suffix indicating it is a RAG application.
- The model URI is formatted to reference a specific version (version 1) of the RAG model within MLflow.
- The RAG model is loaded using the `mlflow.langchain.load_model` function with the specified model URI.
